title: athyrium australe
intro: Athyrium australe, also known as Southern Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Athyrium australe include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's fronds are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
